root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_007000.balance_date, vr_nsk_010_007000.loan_code, vr_nsk_010_007000.loan_code_desc, vr_nsk_010_007000.member_status_code, vr_nsk_010_007000.member_status_name, vr_nsk_010_007000.member_group_no, vr_nsk_010_007000.count_con, vr_nsk_010_007000.emer_balance, vr_nsk_010_007000.emer_intarr, vr_nsk_010_007000.emer_shot, vr_nsk_010_007000.emer_long , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name FROM vr_nsk_010_007000 ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = vr_nsk_010_007000.member_group_no and vr_nsk_010_007000.balance_date = '!balance_date_1!' /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY vr_nsk_010_007000.loan_code ASC, vr_nsk_010_007000.member_group_no ASC
